chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-206 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 21-02-2025 None present for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Mr. Abdul Ghani Abro, Advocate files power on behalf of proposed accused, taken on record. Heard learned counsel for the parties and perused the material available on record. On perusal of impugned order dated 21.03.2024, passed by learned Additional Session Judge-III/Justice of Peace, Khairpur on an application filed by applicant against proposed accused, it appears that the said application has been dismissed for the reasons that there is dispute between the parties over matrimonial affairs and SHO concerned in his report clearly denied the allegations leveled by the applicant being false one as no such incident, as alleged by the applicant, has ever taken place and the matter pertains to Civil Court. The impugned order appears to have been passed after taking into consideration the every aspect of the case with valid and cogent reasons, which calls for no interference of this Court. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed. JUDGE Ahmad
